h1.visual_description: Not present in sample, but typically inferred as the chapter title in this academic monograph style.

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample; the document transitions directly from figures to body text.

h3.visual_description: Small caps, bold-weight serif, used for figure labels.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Image caption with figure numbering and descriptive metadata in a smaller serif font.
Footnote located at the bottom of the page, separated by whitespace, using a smaller font size than body text.
Emphasis or titles of theatrical works and foreign terms (e.g., 'Aladdin', 'changshan').

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Chicago-style footnotes with superscript numbering in body text.

layout_info.primary_flow: multi-column (two-column body text below full-width or side-by-side figures)

margin_noise_patterns.top_right: Author surname in all caps (e.g., MACDONALD)
margin_noise_patterns.bottom: Footnotes positioned at the base of the right-hand column.
